distance_km.note: Source [5] describes Baikal Skiing Marathon with highest spot implying a ski event, consistent with 50km distance claimed, but other sources describe running marathon at 42km; however, query specifies cross-country ski race and [5] matches ski context

elevation_m.note: No sources specify total elevation gain of 350m for Baikal Ski Marathon; [5] mentions lap difference of 60m and highest spot 805m (likely sea level +800m?), insufficient to confirm or deny within ±100m tolerance

country.note: Confirmed as Russia across multiple sources

discipline.note: [5] confirms skiing/cross-country ski marathon, but no specification of classic or skate

field_size.note: No reliable sources found for typical number of ~750 participants

founded.note: No sources found for year founded/first edition
